name: Particle
description: Particle is an IoT platform that lets you manage, monitor, and control connected devices at scale. It provides a cloud API for reading device variables, calling device functions, managing fleets, and streaming real-time events from embedded hardware.

capabilities.name: list_devices
capabilities.description: List all IoT devices owned by the authenticated user, with online status, last heard time, and firmware version.

capabilities.name: get_device_info
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific device including its exposed variables, functions, connectivity status, and firmware version.

capabilities.name: call_device_function
capabilities.description: Remotely invoke a function exposed by device firmware, passing an argument string and receiving a return value.

capabilities.name: read_device_variable
capabilities.description: Read the current value of a variable exposed by device firmware, such as a sensor reading or device state.

capabilities.name: ping_device
capabilities.description: Check whether a device is currently online and reachable by sending a ping request to it.

capabilities.name: get_device_diagnostics
capabilities.description: Retrieve diagnostic vitals from a device including signal strength, memory usage, and connectivity health.

capabilities.name: manage_device
capabilities.description: Update a device's name, notes, or settings, or unclaim it from your account entirely.
